series_metadata.series_description: Pursuant to Chapter 3705 of the Revised Code, Vital Statistics accepts checks in payment of requests for certified/uncertified copies as well as birth lists and searching fees. Those checks dishonored by the bank are returned. If uncollectable by our office and the State Treasurer, they are written off as a loss.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Retained audited by Auditor of State and audit is released
